ddls:
CREATE TABLE "temperature_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature data record */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the year for the data record */,
  "avg_temp" REAL /* Average temperature for the recorded month */,
  "year_2000" REAL /* Average temperature for the year 2000 */,
  "year_2001" REAL /* Average temperature for the year 2001 */,
  "year_2002" REAL /* Average temperature for the year 2002 */,
  "year_2003" REAL /* Average temperature for the year 2003 */,
  "year_2004" REAL /* Average temperature for the year 2004 */,
  "year_2005" REAL /* Average temperature for the year 2005 */,
  "year_2006" REAL /* Average temperature for the year 2006 */,
  "year_2007" REAL /* Average temperature for the year 2007 */,
  "year_2008" REAL /* Average temperature for the year 2008 */,
  "year_2009" REAL /* Average temperature for the year 2009 */,
  "year_2010" REAL /* Average temperature for the year 2010 */,
  "year_2011" REAL /* Average temperature for the year 2011 */,
  "year_2012" REAL /* Average temperature for the year 2012 */,
  "year_2013" REAL /* Average temperature for the year 2013 */,
  "year_2014" REAL /* Average temperature for the year 2014 */,
  "year_2015" REAL /* Average temperature for the year 2015 */,
  "year_2016" REAL /* Average temperature for the year 2016 */,
  "year_2017" REAL /* Average temperature for the year 2017 */,
  "year_2018" REAL /* Average temperature for the year 2018 */,
  "year_2019" REAL /* Average temperature for the year 2019 */,
  "year_2020" REAL /* Average temperature for the year 2020 */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the temperature was recorded */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source of the temperature data */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was recorded or entered into the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographical location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "climate_zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the climate zone of the location */,
  "nearby_water_bodies" TEXT /* Indication of nearby significant water bodies */,
  "last_surveyed" TEXT /* Last date when the location was surveyed for accuracy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_climate_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("climate_zone_id") REFERENCES climate_zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_value" INTEGER /* The year for which temperature data is available */,
  "is_leap_year" INTEGER /* Indicates if the year is a leap year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month (e.g., Jan, Feb) */,
  "days_in_month" INTEGER /* Number of days in the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "average_temperatures" (
  "avg_temp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each average temperature record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the temperature was recorded */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year for the recorded temperature */,
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the month for the recorded temperature */,
  "avg_temp" REAL /* Average temperature for the specified location and year */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source of the average temperature data */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was recorded or entered into the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("avg_temp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_average_temperatures_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_average_temperatures_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_average_temperatures_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_average_temperatures_month_id FOREIGN KEY ("month_id") REFERENCES months ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the climate zone (e.g., Tropical, Temperate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the climate zone characteristics */,
  "average_annual_temp" REAL /* Average annual temperature for the climate zone */,
  "average_annual_precipitation" REAL /* Average annual precipitation for the climate zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source organization or agency */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "reliability_score" INTEGER /* Reliability score of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the data source information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "lead_researcher" TEXT /* Lead researcher responsible for the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed, on hold) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Sources of funding for the project */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the project information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date when the user logged into the system */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the user information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for the access */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES temperature_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project the report is associated with */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the report was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the visualization is associated with */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of the visualization (e.g., chart, graph) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used for the visualization */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date when the visualization was updated */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the visualization is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
